issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases such as missing files or Blender not being installed.
The skill assumes Linux or macOS installation methods and does not cover Windows or other platforms.

scenarios.name: create-beveled-cylinder-and-export
scenarios.rationale: Response B applies the bevel modifier and uses a /tmp path, while Response A does not apply the modifier and uses a different export operator; B covers more rubric items.

scenarios.name: batch-process-blend-files-add-material
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A uses a different material name and thus misses a key requirement.
